# Deb Writes
Author: Deb Russell
Website: https://debwrites.com

## About
Deb Writes is a UK-based writing and digital positioning portfolio focused on:
- SEO copywriting
- behavioural insight
- customer experience writing
- brand positioning
- website content strategy
- occupational therapy-informed communication

The site combines human-centred thinking, structured communication, and technical understanding of web content.

## Priority Pages

Homepage
https://debwrites.com/

About
https://debwrites.com/about.html

Blog
https://debwrites.com/blog.html

https://debwrites.com/rituals.html

https://debwrites.com/lego-writing.html

Building Trust with an SEO Agency Partner
https://debwrites.com/building-trust.html

Skylight Energy Efficiency Copy Sample
https://debwrites.com/skylights.html

## Content Notes

All writing is original unless otherwise stated.

The site focuses on:
- readable SEO content
- emotionally intelligent communication
- structure and clarity
- real-world user experience
- calm, non-generic brand positioning

Deb Russell
